heading: Procedure
body:
In this step, you define an index of the [index definition](avs-types-vector-search) type for
the following fields:

- `plot_embedding_voyage_3_large` field as the [index definition](avs-types-vector-search) type. The `plot_embedding_voyage_3_large` field
  contains embeddings created using Voyage AI's `voyage-3-large` embedding model.
  The index definition specifies `2048` vector dimensions and
  measures similarity using `dotProduct`.

- `genres` field as the [index definition](avs-types-vector-search)
  type for pre-filtering data by string values in the field.

- `year` field as the [index definition](avs-types-vector-search)
  type for pre-filtering data by numeric values in the field.
